assets.name_cn: 拓跋砚熊多状态角色板
downstream_usage: ComfyUI character identity and wardrobe reference
future northern White Bear clan craftsman and shield-guard continuity reference
costume, prop, and material handoff for white bear fur, black iron chest band, leather apron, snow-forge tools, ember seed jar, and plain repaired great shield
assets.qc_summary: Pass: final board reads as a White Bear clan snow-forge craftsman and shield-guard rather than a human fighter, noble shaman, cute bear mascot, or generic siege troop. The three-state system preserves one identity, keeps repair tools and great shield readable, avoids new emblems and visible text, and uses Northern bonewood-fur materials with restrained ember accents.
